description: Meet Alfred is a multichannel automation tool that runs personalized outreach across LinkedIn, email, and X, with a built-in CRM to manage sales pipelines.
overview: Meet Alfred automates personalized outreach across LinkedIn, email, and X, building multichannel sequences and managing contacts through a built-in CRM.
what_is: Meet Alfred is an outreach automation tool that spans LinkedIn, email, and X. It handles connection requests, messages, and follow-ups across channels from one place, taking the repetitive work off reps so they can focus on conversations.

It fits sales teams, agencies, and creators that need personalized multichannel campaigns. Automated sequences and a built-in CRM keep follow-ups and replies organized, and teams generally see activity pick up within days.

Meet Alfred integrates with popular CRMs and tracks performance across channels. It is an automation assistant rather than a full CRM or complex pipeline-management system, built to scale lead generation without extra tooling.
